recommendations.title: Key of Life
recommendations.overview: A failed actor switches identities with a stranger at a bath house thinking it is his way out of his life of misery but only to find himself filling the shoes of an elite assassin.

recommendations.title: Da zero a dieci
recommendations.overview: Twenty years after tragedy cut their graduation trip short, four friends return to that destination to finish what they started in 1980. However, as they find out, you can't repeat the past.

recommendations.title: Bio-Dome
recommendations.overview: Moronic best friends get themselves locked inside the Bio-Dome, a science experiment, along with a group of environmental scientists for one year.

recommendations.title: Thunder Road
recommendations.overview: A police officer faces a personal meltdown following a divorce and the death of his mother.

recommendations.title: Pegasus
recommendations.overview: Zhang Chi, a hubris and dominating six-time racing champion, falls from grace following a crisis. After a five-year suspension from the motorsport, the now single-father to a six-year-old boy throws down the gauntlet once again.

recommendations.title: The Fly
recommendations.overview: When Seth Brundle makes a huge scientific and technological breakthrough in teleportation, he decides to test it on himself. Unbeknownst to him, a common housefly manages to get inside the device and the two become one.

recommendations.title: La vita facile
recommendations.overview: An Italian doctor starts a new life in Kenya to escape the city, but life catches up with him when an old friend offers his assistance along with his wife, who happens to be an old lover.

recommendations.title: Hello Ghost
recommendations.overview: A man's failed suicide attempt enables him to see ghosts, who later keep following him everywhere. It is now up to him to fulfill their wishes to make them go away.

recommendations.title: The Women
recommendations.overview: A happily married woman lets her catty friends talk her into divorce when her husband strays.

recommendations.title: The Awful Truth
recommendations.overview: Unfounded suspicions lead a married couple to begin divorce proceedings, whereupon they start undermining each other's attempts to find new romance.
